name: reeflex-holds
description: MCP server exposing reeflex-core's Human-in-the-Loop (HIL) holds API -- list, inspect, and resolve Reeflex governance holds from any MCP client.

core_url.title: Reeflex core URL
core_url.description: Base URL of the reeflex-core /v1/holds API (e.g. https://api.example.com). Default matches reeflex-holds' own default of http://127.0.0.1:8080.

token.title: Gate token (REEFLEX_TOKEN)
token.description: Bearer token for reeflex-core's holds API, sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. NOTE: this package's env var is REEFLEX_TOKEN, not REEFLEX_CORE_TOKEN used by the other Reeflex adapters -- a known cross-package naming outlier. Never logged.

principal.title: Approver principal (type:id)
principal.description: Identity that resolves holds via resolve_hold, format 'type:id' (e.g. human:leo or agent:triage-bot). Only required to approve/reject a hold; list_holds, get_hold and get_freeze_status work without it.

verify_ssl.title: Verify TLS certificates
verify_ssl.description: When disabled, skips TLS certificate verification against reeflex-core. Default enabled (secure default); disable only for dev/self-signed endpoints, at the operator's own risk.

tools.name: list_holds
tools.description: List Reeflex holds from reeflex-core, optionally filtered by status (pending, approved, rejected, expired, consumed).

tools.name: get_hold
tools.description: Get the full detail of one Reeflex hold, including its Action Envelope.

tools.name: resolve_hold
tools.description: Approve or reject a pending Reeflex hold, as the principal configured on this server (never taken from tool arguments).

tools.name: get_freeze_status
tools.description: Best-effort probe of whether reeflex-core is reachable (freeze_state is always 'unknown' -- core has no dedicated freeze-status endpoint).
